name_en: Organisation of Defensive Innovation and Research (SPND)
description: The Organisation of Defensive Innovation and Research (Sazman-e Pazhuhesh-haye Defai-ye Novin, SPND) is a secretive Iranian defence research body established circa 2011 under the [Ministry of Defense](/orgs/ministry-of-defense). It is widely assessed by Western intelligence services and the IAEA as the successor to the Amad Project — the covert nuclear weapons programme led by [Mohsen Fakhrizadeh](/people/mohsen-fakhrizadeh) until its nominal 'dissolution' in 2003. SPND absorbed key personnel and continued research on weaponisation, high-explosives diagnostics, and delivery system integration. The IAEA has sought access to SPND facilities since 2012. The organisation was headed by [Reza Mozaffari Nia](/people/reza-mozaffari-nia) and later [Hossein Jabal Amelian](/people/hossein-jabal-amelian), both of whom were killed in Israeli airstrikes on 28 February 2026.

editorial_notes: SPND is the successor to AMAD. Sanctioned by US, EU, UK. Its leadership was eliminated in Israeli strikes Feb 28 2026.
